{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Overlord construct
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] modified an [[Overlord construct]] to [[Archlord]] level for [[Yerin]]'s [[construct]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
